title: Set up project repository
description: Initialize the Git repository, set up branch protection rules, and configure the initial CI/CD pipeline for the new project.

comments.author: Anil Kumar
comments.text: Should we use GitHub or GitLab for this project?

replies.author: Priya Menon
replies.text: GitHub. The team is more familiar with it.

replies.author: Priya Menon
replies.text: Done. Pull request template is added too.

replies.author: Rahul Das
replies.text: Don't forget to add CODEOWNERS file.

title: Design database schema
description: Create the ER diagram and define table structures for users, tasks, comments, and audit logs.

comments.author: Suresh Pillai
comments.text: Are we going with PostgreSQL or MySQL?

replies.author: Meera Krishnan
replies.text: PostgreSQL. We need JSONB support for the audit logs.

title: Implement user authentication
description: Build login, signup, password reset flows with JWT-based authentication and refresh token rotation.

title: Build dashboard UI
description: Create the main dashboard with KPI cards, recent activity feed, and quick action buttons.

comments.author: Kavya R
comments.text: Do we have the Figma designs ready?

title: Write API integration tests
description: Set up Postman/Newman collections and integrate them with the CI pipeline for automated API testing.

title: Optimize image loading performance
description: Investigate slow image loading on the gallery page. Users report 5–8 second load times on mobile.

comments.author: Priya Menon
comments.text: Have you considered using lazy loading with intersection observer?

replies.author: Anil Kumar
replies.text: Yes, already implemented. The bottleneck seems to be the image size itself.

title: Update onboarding documentation
description: Refresh the new-developer onboarding guide. Add sections for local setup, common debugging tips, and team conventions.

title: Migrate analytics to new provider
description: Move from the current analytics provider to the new one. Ensure no data loss and update all tracking events.

title: Fix login button alignment on mobile
description: On Safari mobile, the login button appears offset by 8px on the right. Reported by 3 users.

title: Set up error monitoring
description: Integrate Sentry or similar error monitoring service. Configure source maps and alerting rules.

title: Implement role-based access control
description: Add RBAC for admin, manager, and user roles. Each role should have distinct permissions across the application.

title: Refactor legacy payment module
description: Current payment module has technical debt. Refactor to use the new API contract and improve test coverage above 80%.
